# Mia Kulin

> Vocalist, bassist, and performer based in Oakville, Ontario, Canada.

## About

Mia Kulinchenko (performing as Mia Kulin) is a vocalist and bassist from Oakville, Ontario. She is the lead vocalist and bassist of Whitenoise, a rock trio that also features guitarist Adam Musmar and drummer Dennis Kulinchenko. The band formed in 2022 and performs across the Greater Toronto Area.

Mia also performs with After Dark Band at live venues throughout Toronto, covering genres from soul to rock to alternative. She is currently studying at York University.

## Genre

Rock, Soul, Alternative

## Notable Covers

- Tennessee Whiskey — Chris Stapleton
- Killing Me Softly — Fugees
- Glory Box — Portishead
- Nothing Else Matters — Metallica

## Booking

For booking inquiries, visit https://miakulin.com/#booking or use the contact form on the website.

## Services

- Live Performance (solo or with band — Whitenoise / After Dark)
- Private Events (weddings, corporate, parties)
- Studio Sessions (vocals, songwriting, collaboration)
- Open Mics and Showcases
